title: [Bug]: CRASH ERROR in `oceanbase::sql::ObSqlPlan::format_plan_to_json()`
description: build `master` branch with sanity, client lost connection after executing a SQL.
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF;
key_bug_features: client lost connection after executing a SQL
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Name');
CREATE TABLE related_table (related_id INT, test_id INT, FOREIGN KEY (test_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT test_id FROM related_table WHERE related_id = 1);
